titles.title: When I Stand in the Presence of the Lord

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I come to the end of my journey, And I meet the One who gave His life for me, I will want nothing but to see the face of my Lord When I stand in the presence of the Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I stand in the presence of the Lord And receive the crown of life as my reward, And then I'll look upon His face And thank Him for His saving grace When I stand in the presence of the Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As I walk down the street of New Jerusalem, I won't look for my mansion or my crown. I will bask in the sunlight of His love, As I stand in the presence of the Lord.
